title: PE27 4TN, Hook 2 Sisters Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/SP3930UV/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Hook 2 Sisters Limited Installation name: Overcote Poultry Unit Permit number: EPR/SP3930UV/V004  "
